preferences.notes: It felt like the form was made for sad Mr incredible working his office job while the visual was not only easier to traverse but also hurt my eyes less

insights.title: Accuracy comparison
insights.summary: form produced higher mean accuracy by +1.3 pts.

insights.title: Speed comparison
insights.summary: visual was faster on average by +171.9s.

insights.title: NASA-TLX comparison
insights.summary: visual produced lower average workload by 0.8 TLX points.

insights.title: Largest non-cell error source
insights.summary: teleop_fuel_scored had the highest average absolute difference at 35.056.

insights.title: Largest cell-level error source
insights.summary: teleop_shot_cell_5 had the highest average absolute difference at 1.611.
